name: .measure
summary: Measure delay, rise/fall, extrema, and other results (HSPICE)

parameters.name: TRAN|DC|AC
parameters.description: Analysis type the measurement applies to.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Measurement result name written to the measure output.

examples: .MEASURE TRAN trise TRIG V(out) VAL=0.1*vdd RISE=1 TARG V(out) VAL=0.9*vdd RISE=1
.MEASURE TRAN tpd TRIG V(in) VAL=0.5 RISE=1 TARG V(out) VAL=0.5 RISE=1
dialectNotes: Also accepted as .MEAS. Many measure forms exist (FIND/WHEN, PARAM, DERIV, etc.); TRIG/TARG and MAX/MIN cover the most common timing and peak checks.
